events.label: reasoning
events.text: We are asked to identify the component or condition: "missing knockout filler". The scenario: panelboard installation & makeup, rough-complete stage. Observed condition: missing knockout filler. This is a defect because panelboard enclosures must have all openings closed to prevent entry of foreign objects, maintain fire rating, and protect against accidental contact. Missing knockout filler means an open hole in the panelboard enclosure. This is a violation of NEC 110.12(A) (unused openings shall be closed) and possibly 408.7 (panelboard enclosures). It's a safety hazard. So decision: fail. Risk: medium (potential for shock or fire if something enters). Work stage: rough-complete. Component conditions: installed-defective (missing filler). Percent complete: maybe 90%? Panelboard is installed but missing knockout filler, so not fully complete. Value: not applicable. Confidence: high. Findings: "Missing knockout filler in panelboard enclosure." Actions: "Install approved knockout filler to close opening." Rationale: "Unused openings in enclosures must be effectively closed to prevent entry of foreign objects and maintain protection." References: NEC 110.12(A), 408.7. I'll output JSON.
